content.text:
评论数据如下，请依据这些数据进行总结，如无明确指令不要延伸调用其他工具。可以给用户获取延伸数据的功能建议。
[{"评论产品的属性":"Color=4-White","评论日期":"20260213","评星":3.0,"标题":"Did not work on wrinkles caused by packaging","评论":"Bought this to remove wrinkles from dress I bought from Amazon. Did not adequately remove wrinkles. Easy to use"},{"评论产品的属性":"","评论日期":"20260203","评星":3.0,"标题":"It’s ok","评论":"Works well, but not that useful for normal use. More time consuming than an ordinary iron. Not good for traveling"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20260128","评星":3.0,"标题":"Gets Wrinkles Out, but Drips Water","评论":"This steamer does what it’s supposed to do, but it has a few drawbacks that are worth mentioning.
The steam it produces is definitely hot and strong. You can actually see the water boiling inside, and it heats up fairly quickly. It removes wrinkles fast, so from a performance standpoint, it works.

That said, the biggest issue for me is the condensation. While steaming, it tends to drip water onto the clothes, so you need extra time to let them dry before wearing them. Occasionally, it will also spit out small drops of hot water, which is a bit strange considering I’ve been careful to keep the water level below the max fill line.

Another downside is that condensation sometimes runs down toward the handle, and a few hot drops have landed on my hand. It’s not severe, but it is uncomfortable and can catch you off guard.

Overall, if you’re not in a rush and don’t mind letting your clothes dry after steaming, this will get the job done. But if you want something cleaner with no dripping or water spitting, you may want to look into a different model."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=6-Green","评论日期":"20251230","评星":3.0,"标题":"Fragile and inconvenient tank/body interface","评论":"Opened the box, read the sticker on the tank: “pull down to remove“. Pulled down as instructed and the spring-loaded ball valve assembly flew out; luckily I was able to find the tiny plastic ball on the floor.Not only that, but the two plastic tabs that secure the ball valve interface to the steamer body broke off. To reiterate, I removed the water tank as instructed and the plastic tabs broke immediately. I guess the tabs were meant to provide a watertight seal? Now the tank leaks during use.Filling the tank is also a pain; you have to cover the ball valve interface with a thumb to keep water from leaking out during fill. Then you lose some water when you reattach the tank.As a steamer, it works great; the wrinkles melt away. Just some bad design choices that make it a pain to use. Given the convenience of steaming over ironing, I plan to pay for one that‘s better quality."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251215","评星":1.0,"标题":"Long term issues","评论":"The first 6 months, the product worked well. Now I find that after it heats up, it only steams for about 15 seconds before it has to reheat and repeat. Quite frustrating and time consuming to use. I would not purchase again.."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251214","评星":2.0,"标题":"Water everywhere","评论":"Mine worked but not without drenching the floor with steaming water and the dress that I was steaming. Absolutely trash. Might have been a defective one based off of the other reviews."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251213","评星":2.0,"标题":"Spits water","评论":"This steamer is ok. But be careful it spits water and leaves your clothes not ready to go but looking like a wet mess. I bought it to replace a steamer my daughter lost and this isn’t a great replacement.. I keep leaving it out and hope she’ll borrrow this one and maybe I can justify a new one, but not yet.  It gets to clothes too wet and doesn’t really work well."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251213","评星":1.0,"标题":"Burned my hand.","评论":"Garbage. Don‘t waste your money. There‘s no way to regulate heat and if you fill to exactly the “max“ mark it begins to over boil and spew water. It spews water so badly that it burned my hand. It‘s completely unusable and will probably damage the delicate fabric it‘s supposed to steam. Unfortunately I only tested it for a short time and didn‘t realize this until I used it on a full outfit but unfortunately I‘m past the return time so I need to find a better option."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251212","评星":1.0,"标题":"Worked One Time!!!!","评论":"Absolute garbage. I used it once to test it. It worked great. I took it on a trip and it didn’t work. I thought because I was in a foreign country, the adapter would be the issue. I brought it home, plugged it in, and it DID NOT WORK!  Had I known, I would have left it in Spain"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251212","评星":1.0,"标题":"Does not replace an iron","评论":"Don’t do it! I thought I never wanted to use an iron again…thought I would try one of these steamers. The worst purchase of the year! It does not replace an iron in any way. It did not remove wrinkles and was awkward to use. It is absolute garbage."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251209","评星":1.0,"标题":"Worst ever steamer!!","评论":"I took this on a cruise plugged it in and it did nothing!!  Needless to say I had wrinkled clothes the whole trip!!"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251208","评星":1.0,"标题":"Waste of money!","评论":"Waste of my money. Wish I would’ve sent it back before the 30 days were over. Doesn’t even work anymore."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251208","评星":1.0,"标题":"I will never buy another steamer from Amazon","评论":"This is not good, it doesn’t work, all it did was wet up the clothes, I am sorry I did use it sooner so I could return it, it’s garbage, I did bought another steamer from Amazon before and that works for a little bit and then stop so now I bought this one and it is not good, Never again, I am not even gonna give it any rating, simple Garbage."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251208","评星":1.0,"标题":"Spits boiling hot water everywhere - burn hazard.","评论":"Unfortunately it worked once and then after that (after return window) it started to spit boiling hot water out the seam and steam holes. I tried multiple times but it keeps doing it."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251206","评星":3.0,"标题":"It leaks,  but it is still a great clothes steamer!","评论":"I really liked this steamer. It works great! So why the 3 stars? Because it leaks. Perhaps because I bought it used. I don‘t know. I will still recommend it because maybe I got a bad one."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251206","评星":2.0,"标题":"Hot Water Spitter","评论":"I purchased due to its small size and lower wattage. I was disappointed after the 1st use at it no longer steams, just spits hot water out."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251206","评星":2.0,"标题":"Not my favorite","评论":"Simple to put together but not powerful enough for my liking, water spots on clothes, and spurts out water when I set down to turn off"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251204","评星":1.0,"标题":"Felt unsafe","评论":"Felt unsafe using this product.  It boiled out the top.  Feared my hand would be burnt also made the garment wet."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251204","评星":1.0,"标题":"Get a better quality steamer instead","评论":"Broke on the first use :( top of it go so distorted from the heat, now I can’t click it close at all. Had to run to Target and got a $50 one that works much better."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251203","评星":1.0,"标题":"Skip this purchase","评论":"Doesn’t steamed well"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251203","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not worth buying","评论":"Stopped working after first use. Disappointed in the product."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251130","评星":3.0,"标题":"Leaked and plate chipped","评论":"I loved this steamer for a while but it is heavy with water filled up. It tipped over when I sat it down on the counter and I think that is what chipped the ceramic plate. I can‘t use it now because it snags all my clothes if I get too close. I did find I needed to be very close to the fabric to fully get the wrinkles out. It also leaks water when you turn it on so be sure to run it over a towel or something first or else your clothing will be wet. Unfortunately I‘ll be trying another brand."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251129","评星":1.0,"标题":"SPITS OUT BOILING WATER!","评论":"Spits out boiling water! Looked at trouble shooting in manual, but I was doing everything right! Shoots out water even when sitting on the counter. Will be returning this! So disappointed."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251129","评星":1.0,"标题":"Used item received.","评论":"Received a used product.• Hard water stains• Human hair wedged in plastic housing"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251128","评星":2.0,"标题":"It’s okay","评论":"Decent steamer. Runs for several minutes before needing to add more water. It spits water badly if it gets too low so you have to monitor the water level closely. I got burned once."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251126","评星":1.0,"标题":"Sprays water on fabric","评论":"Sprays water on fabric. Boils out the spout. Returning"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251126","评星":3.0,"标题":"Poor water tank design","评论":"Powerful with good steaming performance,  However, the cap on the water tank has no anchor and can pop out and get lost.  The tank is hard to remove without a struggle sometimes and the water splashes on the floor (especially if the cap is lost)."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251126","评星":1.0,"标题":"Arrived used and gross","评论":"This was used when I got it. Clear, undeniable used tap water evidence. I did NOT order a used item. I ordered a new one. I am so disappointed."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251125","评星":3.0,"标题":"Disappointed","评论":"Works only on linen or thin cotton barely"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251125","评星":1.0,"标题":"Broken after ONE use","评论":"used this to try steaming some clothes. Turns on fine, steams fine, but the ‘on-off‘ button BROKE within ONE HOUR. the button somehow dropped into the machine, and when i took it apart to see if I can pull it out, the mechanism clip that keeps the button in place fell out. this thing is a $2 piece of crap, and is NOT worth the price. just buy a nice iron and use the steam function on that."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251124","评星":1.0,"标题":"Poor quality","评论":"Not happy with this steamer; not working well."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251124","评星":3.0,"标题":"No la volvería a comprar","评论":"Esperaba más planchado"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251124","评星":1.0,"标题":"didn‘t even last 1 year","评论":"Stopped working after 6 months and has poor ergo."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251124","评星":3.0,"标题":"Leaks burning water","评论":"Do not buy. It leaks boiling water and burns you. Maybe mine is missing a rubber seal or something"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251124","评星":3.0,"标题":"No la volvería a comprar","评论":"Esperaba más planchado"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251123","评星":3.0,"标题":"Meh","评论":"Maybe it’s just me, but I really didn’t think it did a very good job.I’ll update if my opinion changes"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251123","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not worth it.","评论":"I’ve used steamers previously but this unit not only leaked excessively (water left on clothes) but no matter how level I kept it - would intermittently leak steam as I was using it. Tonight was the last time using it as this time, the steam leaked on my hand - burning me and I dropped the unit, and the base cracked exposing wires."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251123","评星":2.0,"标题":"Not worth the hype","评论":"I really wish I could say this steamer worked for us. This is the first time I’ve left a less than stellar review on Amazon. It burns if you’re not wearing heavy gloves. The time it takes to get wrinkles out feels like a chore and it only works well on the more faint wrinkles. I feel like I blow through a tank of water for one and a half articles of clothing. I missed the return window trying to give it a chance and I regret that now. I should have spent more and gone with a different style."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251122","评星":1.0,"标题":"Never works","评论":"Just a big kettle . Not sure how it’s rated good . For me clothes remain as it is . Not even slightest change"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251122","评星":1.0,"标题":"nope","评论":"Senior citizen here with spinal issues trying to avoid dragging out an ironing board to remove wrinkles from curtains.  thought I‘d give this a try.  First, it took longer than I thought to heat up. Second, it smelled like chemicals once it did start heating up. Third, it didn‘t seal tightly & hot water was spit from the seam between the body of the steamer & the attachment.  Fourth, I had to remove some of the hot water from the tank in order not to get it to spew the boiling water everywhere. And no, I did not overfill it.  and lastly, once I did get it to stop spitting boiling water, it still leaked water onto my curtains & failed to remove the wrinkles.  not at all worth the money or the aggravation. its going back."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251121","评星":1.0,"标题":"don‘t buy","评论":"sucked"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251121","评星":2.0,"标题":"No plancha!","评论":"No plancha"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251120","评星":2.0,"标题":"Only really works on cotton materials","评论":"Tried to use this on a dress shirt and it would not remove the wrinkles. Then tried it on a cotton poly blend and it worked as it’s supposed to.It’s frustrating that it doesn’t work on all types of material but if you wear majority of cotton then this will work for you."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251120","评星":1.0,"标题":"Still had water in it.","评论":"Might work ok but I was sent a used product. Still had water in it."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251120","评星":1.0,"标题":"Drips…drips…drips!","评论":"Strong level of steam pressure, however, water drippages consistently all over my silk top and my ironing board pad. Water tank drained by 3/4 in about five minutes. More of a watery mess than a wrinkle free garment. Disappointed.To be honest, I’ll just iron as I have been."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Sky Blue","评论日期":"20251120","评星":1.0,"标题":"Wanted to love","评论":"I really wanted to like the steamer based on all of the amazing reviews, but mine spit out large amounts of hot boiling water. I burned myself multiple times with the amount of water it would spit out at once"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251120","评星":1.0,"标题":"JUNK!","评论":"Terrible!!! Same experience as others. Used it once and now it just spurts hot water and gets everything soaked! Complete junk!"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251120","评星":1.0,"标题":"Horrible","评论":"This steamer is pathetic, it doesn’t work, and it shoots steaming hot water out of it that burns you and makes a mess!"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251119","评星":2.0,"标题":"Disappointed","评论":"Does not work well."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251119","评星":1.0,"标题":"Do not buy","评论":"Horrible. Leaks water everywhere."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251119","评星":1.0,"标题":"Doesn’t heat up","评论":"Got it a month ago and it stopped working"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251118","评星":2.0,"标题":"It‘s just okay","评论":"It‘s okay.."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251117","评星":1.0,"标题":"Spits watee","评论":"Dangerous to use. Spits boiling water all over the clothes you are trying to steam as well as the floor."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251116","评星":1.0,"标题":"Terrible quality","评论":"Used once and it no longer holds water. Didn‘t work great the first time using either."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251116","评星":1.0,"标题":"Does not work","评论":"Horrible it was spitting water out like crazy. Do Not buy."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251116","评星":1.0,"标题":"Do Not Buy","评论":"I used this steamer twice before it stopped working. It has a one year warranty from the manufacturer but they will not respond. Do not waste your money. Buy something a little more expensive from a reputable company."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251115","评星":2.0,"标题":"Spits Water Everywhere","评论":"This steamer won‘t stop sputtering.  Even half full of water creates nothing but sputtering of water all over the fabric."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251115","评星":1.0,"标题":"Worthless","评论":"Worthless, takes 10 mins to de wrinkle a slightly wrinkled white tee. Even then there are still wrinkles."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251115","评星":2.0,"标题":"Spits and drips water everywhere","评论":"Spit water everywhere unless a very small amount of water was added. I was constantly having to add water which required turning it off and letting it cool. Took an hour to steam 1 dress with minor wrinkles in it."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251114","评星":3.0,"标题":"Customer Feedback!","评论":"Not too impressed…"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251114","评星":1.0,"标题":"Worst steamer","评论":"By far this is the very worst steamer I have ever purchased. It doesn’t matter what the water level is, the steamer spits water constantly, soaking my clothes and burning my hand. It will be going straight in the trash."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251113","评星":2.0,"标题":"Good while it lasted","评论":"I bought this in June and it worked fine until it recently stopped working. Icleaned the nozzle per the troubleshooting recommendation, but it doesn’t heat up."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251112","评星":2.0,"标题":"Spits out tons of boiling water, not steam","评论":"Not sure if it’s a product issue or operator issue but when I turn on the steamer, it shoots out boiling hot water all over the place. I made sure to not fill it beyond the max line and I’ve only used it twice. I’m not sure what the problem is or how to fix it. Any suggestions?"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251111","评星":1.0,"标题":"RUN dont Walk...Absolute garbage","评论":"Filled with distilled water and plugged it in. Produced some steam, but was spitting so much water the reservoir was empty in 3 minutes. Read the instructions and it said, “If you notice ...spraying water excessively during it‘s [sic] use, stop using and contact our customer support immediately.“  If you are creating such garbage quality that you need to include a known issue in your printed material instead of just having better QC, maybe you can eat the return expense too."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251111","评星":1.0,"标题":"Doesn’t work.","评论":"Doesn’t work.  Makes a mess. Spillls water the entire time and doesn’t do a good job of ironing. I used twice and never used again."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=White","评论日期":"20251111","评星":1.0,"标题":"Leaks","评论":"Leaks like crazy"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=White","评论日期":"20251111","评星":1.0,"标题":"Don’t buy","评论":"This item is a piece of junk.  Leaks something terrible"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251110","评星":2.0,"标题":"Not powerful enough","评论":"Barely any steam comes out. I still have to iron because there’s hardly any steam"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251109","评星":1.0,"标题":"Pulled my dress","评论":"Super unhappy with mine.  It has a sharp spot in each edge of where the steam comes out, and it pulled my new dress!  Really unhappy with this."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Sky Blue","评论日期":"20251109","评星":1.0,"标题":"Poor Quality. DO NOT BUY","评论":"I bought this steamer in July and it‘s now November 8, 2025. It suddenly stopped working last week."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251109","评星":1.0,"标题":"Water sprays out onto the clothes and leaks","评论":"Worked good for about two weeks. Now the water spits out onto the clothes and leaks out the sides… which burns your hand. Do not recommend."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251109","评星":1.0,"标题":"Defective upon arrival","评论":"Ítem arrived, but the tank leaks. Imagine boiling hot water leaking while you’re trying to stem your cloths. Unacceptable."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251108","评星":1.0,"标题":"Leaks boiling water","评论":"This steamer has been used one time (todsy) and while I was using it, boiling hot water would occasion leak out of the part where the nozzle connects with the base and run down my hand. Which was not awesome, because it was burning hot. Unfortunately I am apparently outside the return window. So yeah."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251108","评星":1.0,"标题":"Dangerous!","评论":"Similar experience as a few others. When this thing heats up it starts to leak around the removable top and spray water. I burned my fingers because of the water leaking back under the handle. It also then start spewing water out of the spout. Amazon really should have this product removed given it has happened more times than it should according to other reviews."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251107","评星":3.0,"标题":"Do not purchase","评论":"This steamer is not worth it… It takes a while to heat up and spits out a lot of water almost soaking my clothes when steaming; As people have stated.It’s not worth the money. Do not purchase. I would not recommend this product."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251107","评星":1.0,"标题":"Non-working, no customer support","评论":"This steamer didn‘t work when I used it the first time. I sent 3 emails to support and received no response. I would not recommend."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Black","评论日期":"20251106","评星":1.0,"标题":"Bad Steamer","评论":"Barely gets wrinkles out. Do not recommend."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Maya Blue","评论日期":"20251105","评星":1.0,"标题":"Don’t buy","评论":"I wouldn’t buy again.Made weird marks on our brand new dresses for the wedding"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=A-White","评论日期":"20251104","评星":1.0,"标题":"Piece of Junk - Company Does Not Stand by 1 Year Warranty!","评论":"Piece of junk - stopped working after I had only used it 3 times. Has a 1 year warranty, but they do not honor that. I followed the procedure outlined in their manual of how to request a refund as still under warranty. I emailed them on 10/12/25 and still no response at all from them.
